deliverables.name: Community Use Case Synthesis
deliverables.description: 12 real-world use cases documented from X/Twitter, Reddit, and YouTube with Zo features used, complexity level, and role/profession for each

deliverables.name: Competitive Landscape Table
deliverables.description: Feature-by-feature comparison of 6 competitors (Claude, ChatGPT, OpenClaw, Cursor/Windsurf, Zapier/Make, Notion AI) with honest assessments, concessions, and one-line differentiators

deliverables.name: Messaging Cheat Sheet
deliverables.description: Proven phrases + new recommendations + concession-pivot framework + caller-type messaging matrix. Voice-friendly format ready for D4 to wire into system prompt

deliverables.name: Idealism / Open Source Talking Points
deliverables.description: Zo's open ecosystem positioning, closed vs open comparison table, three philosophical pillars, community signal from real user posts

deliverables.name: Gap Analysis
deliverables.description: Cross-reference of what callers ask about vs what Zoseph knows. 8 gaps filled by D3, 6 remaining gaps identified for D4

youtube: Stack Snacks - 'Why I Prefer Zo Over OpenClaw'

d4_handoff.system_prompt_integration: One-line differentiators and concession-pivot framework ready for prompt wiring
d4_handoff.explorer_pathway_expansion: 12 real use cases with profession-based quick reference
